Don't Miss the Next One

Join our free Oklahoma Rent-to-Own community on Facebook. You'll get notified first about upcoming events, see available homes, and connect with others on the same path to homeownership.

Join the Free Community 📋 Join the Waitlist for Next Event

What This Seminar Covers

  • How rent-to-own and owner financing actually work (step by step)
  • Why you don't need a bank or perfect credit to buy a home
  • What to look for in a contract — and what to avoid
  • How to qualify yourself before you even talk to a seller
  • Real examples of OKC families who bought homes this way
  • Live Q&A with a licensed real estate professional

Can't wait for the next event? Join the community and start learning today.

Get on the Waitlist

Be the first to know when we announce the next seminar. We'll text you as soon as registration opens.

✅ You're on the list! We'll reach out as soon as the next event is announced.

One or more managing members hold an active real estate license in Oklahoma. This is not financial advice, nor are we acting as financial advisors. Home Run Homes is a matchmaking service connecting buyers with owner-financed properties. Always read agreements before signing and consult with appropriate professionals.
